_notes: Hand-curated by reading the US Core CarePlan differential (9 elements) line by line against the R4 CarePlan snapshot. Key R4 facts: text min=0 max=1; text.status not in CarePlan snapshot (Narrative type, min=1, required:narrative-status); text.div not in CarePlan snapshot (Narrative type, min=1); status min=1 required:request-status|4.0.1; intent min=1 required:care-plan-intent|4.0.1; category min=0 example:care-plan-category; subject min=1 Reference(Patient|Group). US Core adds MustSupport, removes version pins, makes category [1..*] with mandatory 'AssessPlan' slice (assess-plan from us-core careplan-category CodeSystem), tightens text.status binding, and constrains subject to us-core-patient. All diff elements have USCDI annotations.

drifts.description: MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to CarePlan.text in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target. CarePlan.text.status inherits min=1 from the FHIR Narrative datatype (conformance-critical).

Binding changed/tightened: R4 Narrative.status uses required:narrative-status (generated|extensions|additional|empty). US Core explicitly constrains to required:us-core-narrative-status (additional|empty|generated only, excluding 'extensions').
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to CarePlan.text.status in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target. CarePlan.text.div inherits min=1 from the FHIR Narrative datatype (conformance-critical).
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to CarePlan.text.div in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
Binding version pin removed: R4 binds to 'request-status|4.0.1' (version-locked). US Core binds to 'request-status' (no version pin). Strength remains required in both.
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to CarePlan.status in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
Binding version pin removed: R4 binds to 'care-plan-intent|4.0.1' (version-locked). US Core binds to 'care-plan-intent' (no version pin). Strength remains required in both.
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to CarePlan.intent in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
Cardinality changed: [0..*] -> [1..*]. At least one category becomes mandatory in US Core; R4 allows a CarePlan without a category.
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
Slicing added on CarePlan.category: discriminator type=pattern, path=$this, rules=open. Allows named category slices to be defined.
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to CarePlan.category in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
New mandatory slice 'AssessPlan' added [1..1]: patternCodeableConcept coding system=http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/CodeSystem/careplan-category code=assess-plan. No equivalent in R4 base.
MustSupport added on mandatory slice 'AssessPlan' (min=1 -> conformance-critical). A new MS=true slice is added.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to CarePlan.category:AssessPlan in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
Reference target profiles constrained: R4 allows Reference(Patient|Group). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-patient) only.
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to CarePlan.subject in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
